title: User login validation
description: As a registered user, I want to log in to the application using my username and password so that I can access the secure area.
acceptanceCriteria: Given valid credentials (tomsmith / SuperSecretPassword!), when I submit the login form, then I should be redirected to /secure and see a success flash message containing 'You logged into a secure area'
Given invalid credentials, when I submit the login form, then I should stay on /login and see an error flash message containing 'Your username is invalid' or 'Your password is invalid'
Given empty username and password fields, when I submit the login form, then I should see validation feedback and not be redirected
Given a valid username but wrong password, when I submit, then I should see a password-specific error message
Given SQL injection in the username field (e.g. ' OR 1=1 --), the application should not crash and should return an error message
notes: Test site: https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login — username: tomsmith, password: SuperSecretPassword!
